query:
WITH doomed AS (
                SELECT id, template_id
                FROM requests
                WHERE created_by = $1
                  AND batch_id IS NULL
                LIMIT $2
                FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
            ),
            deleted AS (
                DELETE FROM requests r
                USING doomed d
                WHERE r.id = d.id
                RETURNING d.template_id
            )
            SELECT template_id FROM deleted
